text:
AI agents just learned to talk to each other.

Google's A2A protocol — Agent-to-Agent — lets autonomous systems coordinate, delegate, and execute across platforms without a human in the loop for every handoff.

Builders who understand orchestration are the ones who ship.

Follow @layer8culture if you're building with AI.
